brand.fontFamily: -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Noto Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji

workflow.name: How do I convert a lead into an opportunity and assign it to a team member?
workflow.description: This workflow guides you through the process of converting a lead into an opportunity in Salesforce Lightning and assigning it to a team member. The process involves navigating to the Leads section, selecting the desired lead, initiating the conversion process, filling in the necessary opportunity details, and assigning the opportunity to a team member.

steps.title: Click Leads Tab
steps.description: Click the 'Leads' tab in the main navigation bar.

steps.title: Select Lead
steps.description: In the 'Recent Leads' list, click on the name of the lead you want to convert.

steps.title: Click Convert Button
steps.description: On the lead's detail page, click the 'Convert' button located in the top right corner.

steps.title: Set Converted Status
steps.description: In the 'Convert Lead' dialog, ensure the 'Converted Status' dropdown is set to the appropriate status.

steps.title: Check Create Opportunity
steps.description: Ensure the 'Don't create an opportunity upon conversion' checkbox is unchecked to create an opportunity.

steps.title: Opportunity Name
steps.description: Click on the opportunity name button to edit or confirm the name for the new opportunity.

steps.title: Assign Record Owner
steps.description: In the 'Record Owner' field, select the team member who will own the new records.

steps.title: Finalize Conversion
steps.description: Click the 'Convert' button to finalize the lead conversion and create the opportunity.

steps.title: Conversion Confirmation
steps.description: A confirmation message will appear indicating the lead has been converted and the opportunity created.
